heading: Reporters for House of Representatives
label: 5561 Reporters for House of Representatives
text: No person shall be employed as a reporter for the House of Representatives without the approval of the Speaker.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 84a of this titleR.S. § 54 derived from , .act Apr. 2, 1872, ch. 79, § 317 Stat. 47
